name: Deterministic Core
summary: Authenticated SQLite-backed deterministic planning core with no in-memory operational dependencies.

name: Deterministic Robot Runtime
summary: Scan → Snapshot → Plan → Execute on local hardware with value-aware routing, restart safety, and deterministic execution.
exit_criteria: Mandatory consolidation phase implemented and validated
Physical execution loop operational on Pi/Arduino with command dispatch protocol
Step reconciliation implemented; safe stop supported
All runs restart-safe; resume rehydrates from persisted state (no hidden in-memory dependencies)
Capacity-aware provisioning implemented (35 LIFO bins; Unrecognized excluded)
Hard pinned-bin constraints enforced during provisioning
Virtual bin co-location semantics implemented (contiguous segments; higher priority stacked; no interleaving)
Operator split_into_bins prefix rule enforced; correctness may override split
Deterministic move minimization implemented (same inputs → same plan)
Purge routing support implemented (runtime capability; collection-aware evaluation when collection inventory exists)
Per-print run price snapshot persisted and immutable during run; restart rehydrates snapshot
No remote start enforced (local-only motion enabling)
Small batch physical sort succeeds end-to-end

name: Collection Intelligence Interface
summary: Structured collection interface with authoritative inventory, pricing, and analytics.
exit_criteria: Collection inventory substrate persisted (counts per collection)
Live price refresh updates global printing prices but must not mutate active run snapshots

name: User Rule Engine
summary: User-defined policy engine for thresholds, exceptions, and value-aware purge decisions.
exit_criteria: Value-aware purge policy defined (keep-counts, thresholds, destinations)
Virtual bin stacking logic validated against tier boundary preservation

name: Vision Pipeline
summary: Automated card identification with retry and fallback logic.

name: Cloud Partitioning
summary: Strict multi-user isolation and remote robot access.
